---
name: "Task for the agent (non-developer friendly)"
about: "Ask the overnight loop to do something — in plain words, no code needed."
title: "[task] "
labels: ["task"]
---

<!--
You do not need to know how to code. Describe what you want in plain words.
The overnight loop reads open issues like this one, splits them into safe pieces,
and opens pull requests you review in the morning.
코드를 몰라도 됩니다. 원하는 것을 평이한 말로 적으세요.
-->

## What I want done / 원하는 것

<!-- e.g. "Fix the typos in the docs", "Add a contributing guide", "Make the
     README clearer for a beginner". / 예: "문서 오타 고쳐줘", "README를 초보자에게
     더 쉽게" -->

## Why / 왜 (optional)

<!-- What problem does this solve? / 이게 무슨 문제를 해결하나요? -->

## Anything off-limits? / 하면 안 되는 것 (optional)

<!-- The agent already asks before anything risky, irreversible, or that costs
     money. Note anything extra here. / 위험·비가역·돈 드는 일은 어차피 먼저
     물어봅니다. 추가로 피할 게 있으면 적어주세요. -->
